title: keywrap mod gate missing wolfssl_aes_keywrap
description: wolfcrypt/src/lib.rs gates 'pub mod keywrap' on feature=keywrap only, not on wolfssl_aes_keywrap. The module compiles but fails to link when wolfSSL is built without HAVE_AES_KEYWRAP. The re-export at line 406-407 has the correct dual gate; the mod declaration does not. Fix: change the mod declaration to #[cfg(all(feature = "keywrap", wolfssl_aes_keywrap))].
